indicators.name: long wooden conference table
indicators.rationale: The long wooden conference table is too large and lacks a built-in surface for a single user, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: white rolling chairs
indicators.rationale: White rolling chairs are not ergonomic and do not provide a comfortable sitting position for extended computer work.

indicators.name: lack of personal flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat personal work surface available for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no built-in power outlets
indicators.rationale: No built-in power outlets make it difficult to connect a laptop or other devices.

indicators.name: no built-in desk lamp
indicators.rationale: No built-in desk lamp makes it difficult to illuminate the workspace properly.

indicators.name: no built-in storage
indicators.rationale: No built-in storage makes it difficult to organize personal items and reference materials.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for solo computer work due to the lack of a personal flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and built-in power outlets and desk lamp. The long conference table and white rolling chairs are not suitable for solo work, and there is no built-in storage for personal items and reference materials.
